Muted Horizon

Muted Horizon is a minimalist digital art piece that evokes the stillness of dusk over a distant sea. Perfect for calm, airy interiors or to add a quiet pause to gallery walls.

€177

Prenota Muted Horizon per €177 Regala Muted Horizon a $177

Include

  • Soft, desaturated tones with a calming composition

  • Ideal for minimalist or coastal-inspired interiors

  • Digital download for easy printing

Specifiche

  • Format: Digital download (JPG, PNG)

  • Dimensions: 3500x5000px (suitable for A2 size printing)

  • Color Mode: RGB (CMYK-compatible)

  • Frame: Not included

Licenze

This license allows for personal and commercial display of the digital artwork.Redistribution, resale, or modification of the file is not permitted. See full license terms for more details.

Domande Frequenti

Can I change the colors?

No, the file is not editable. What you see is what you get.

Can I use it as a phone or desktop wallpaper?

Yes, feel free to crop it to fit your screens.

Will I receive a physical print?

No, this is a digital product only.

Vivi un’esperienza di ritratto pensata su misura, dove luce, tempo e presenza si incontrano per raccontare la tua storia. Contattaci per prenotare la tua sessione esclusiva nell’atelier.

Since 1976 fotografia di ritratto

Lo studio fotografico riceve
esclusivamente su appuntamento
